summary: Modular web app for automatic graph digitization with image upload, auto-detection, manual calibration, data extraction, and CSV/JSON export.

modules.name: index.html
modules.purpose: Main entry point; loads all assets and initializes the app.
modules.notes: References styles.css, app.js, and all other JS modules. Contains main layout with upload area, graph preview, and controls.

modules.name: styles.css
modules.purpose: Global styles for the app, including dark mode, layout, and interactive elements.
modules.notes: Defines styles for upload area, graph preview, sliders, buttons, and data tables.

modules.name: app.js
modules.purpose: Core app initialization and state management.

public_api.name: init
public_api.description: Initializes the app, sets up event listeners, and loads initial state.

public_api.name: getState
public_api.description: Returns the current state of the app.

public_api.name: setState
public_api.description: Updates the app state and triggers necessary updates.

modules.notes: Manages shared state and coordinates between modules.

modules.name: upload.js

public_api.name: setupUpload
public_api.description: Sets up the upload button and drop zone event listeners.

public_api.name: handleImageUpload
public_api.description: Processes the uploaded image and updates the state.

modules.notes: Validates image format and size, then passes the image to the graph detector.

modules.name: graph_detector.js
modules.purpose: Auto-detects graph lines and axes from the uploaded image.

public_api.name: detectGraph
public_api.description: Analyzes the image to detect graph lines and axes.

public_api.name: getDetectedLines
public_api.description: Returns the detected lines and axes.

modules.notes: Uses image processing to identify lines and axes, then passes data to calibration module.

modules.name: calibration.js
modules.purpose: Handles manual axis calibration via user input.

public_api.name: setupCalibration
public_api.description: Sets up calibration UI and event listeners.

public_api.name: calibrateAxes
public_api.signature: calibrateAxes(points: Array<{x: number, y: number}>, axisValues: {x: {min: number, max: number}, y: {min: number, max: number}})
public_api.description: Calibrates the axes based on user input.

modules.notes: Allows users to click axis corners and input values, then updates the state.

modules.name: data_extractor.js
modules.purpose: Extracts data points from the calibrated graph.

public_api.name: extractDataPoints
public_api.description: Extracts data points based on the calibrated graph and point density.

modules.notes: Uses the calibrated axes to extract data points and allows adjusting point density.

modules.name: export.js
modules.purpose: Handles exporting data to CSV or JSON.

public_api.name: exportToCSV
public_api.description: Exports data points to a CSV file.

public_api.name: exportToJSON
public_api.description: Exports data points to a JSON file.

modules.notes: Generates downloadable CSV or JSON files from the extracted data.

modules.name: preview.js
modules.purpose: Renders a preview of the extracted data in different graph styles.

public_api.name: renderPreview
public_api.signature: renderPreview(data: Array<{x: number, y: number}>, style: string)
public_api.description: Renders a preview of the data in the specified style (line, bar, scatter, area).

public_api.name: updatePreview
public_api.description: Updates the preview based on the current state.

modules.notes: Uses canvas or SVG to render the graph preview dynamically.
